iterations.theme: Sveti Josip: Kraljevsko porijeklo, uloga u povijesti spasenja i primjer za suvremenog čovjeka
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire transcript constitutes a single, continuous homily on St. Joseph, covering his significance, lineage, role as a model, and concluding with a personal testimony, making it a natural thematic unit.
